title: Phase 9.3 — Self-Improvement Reliability Campaign
summary:
**Phase 9.3 — Self-Improvement Reliability Campaign: COMPLETE**

**12/12 trials completed through governed spine — 100% success rate**

| Metric | Before | After | Delta |
|--------|--------|-------|-------|
| Medium contradictions | 2 | 0 | -2 |
| Low contradictions | 2 | 0 | -2 |
| Orphaned subsystems | 2 | 0 | -2 |
| Readiness composite | 79.8 | 91.5 | +11.65 |

Real fixes: deployment paths, API route extraction, dependency wiring.
Verification: 128 Phase 9 tests pass, 0 regressions. PR #12 merged.

title: Phase 9.4 — Primitive-Native Coherence Propagation
summary: **Shipped:** Template Registry (7 statuses, 15 types), Agent Capability Model (per-agent reliability), Coherence Propagation Engine (2-wave parallel, 8/8 targets). CompositionEngine now supports template-guided plans. 64 new tests, zero regressions. All 13 success criteria proven.

title: Phase 10.0 complete — production template library + cadence candidate supply
summary:
Phase 10.0 merged (PR #45) and deployed. All endpoints live.

**What shipped:**
- Cockpit quality gate: cockpit.py 3,542 → 2,247 lines (4 route modules extracted)
- Template library: 10 evidence-backed templates seeded from Phase 9.2-9.9
- Template governance: 9-dimension scoring engine with 4 decision tiers
- Candidate supply engine: 6-source discovery with template matching + ranking
- Cadence integration: real candidate supply wired into autonomous cadence
- 7 new cockpit API routes (all with operator auth)
- PR factory preview: generates review packet without creating PR
- 81 new tests (1,240 total organism tests pass)
- Security fix: all new routes require operator authentication

**Verification:**
- template-registry: 10 promoted templates visible
- template-governance/evaluate: all 9 dimensions scoring
- pr-factory-preview: returns real candidate with evidence
- All 4 pre-commit gates pass
- commit 0f9bce08 running on localhost:8091

**Remaining:** BRW-02 (full browser test) blocked on Fly.io 502 — deployment concern, not code defect.

title: Phase 10.2 — Operator-Approved Template-Supplied Sandbox PR Creation
summary:
**Phase 10.2 Complete** — PR #48 merged

- Operator Approval Gate (276 lines) — explicit approve/reject before sandbox execution
- Sandbox Orchestrator (216 lines) — end-to-end governed pipeline
- Baseline Validation Gate — fixed false negatives from pre-existing violations
- Route Auth Hardening — 7 previously unprotected routes + 1 missing operatorGuard
- 10 new organism routes (all OPERATOR-guarded) + 9 bridge endpoints
- PR #47 — first real sandbox PR from cadence-discovered candidate
- 43 new tests, 1239 total passing, zero regressions
- Audit: docs/audits/convergence/phase10_2_operator_approved_template_supplied_sandbox_pr.md

title: Phase 10.3 — First Sandbox PR Promoted to Verified Production Truth
summary:
PR #47 (first cadence-generated sandbox PR) reviewed, operator-merged, verified by ProductionMergeVerifier, and promoted to production truth.

- ProductionTruthDelta ptd-968247f8 computed (status: production_verified)
- Template confidence updated 0.800 → 1.000
- Agent reliability updated
- Resolved candidate suppressed in cadence
- 142 tests pass (18 new for Phase 10.3)
- Fixed merge verifier diff isolation
- Fixed production truth delta detail endpoint
- PR #49 merged (commit b37e00be)

Complete loop proven: Template → Candidate → Cadence → Approval → Sandbox → PR → Merge → Verifier → Delta → Learning → Cadence Improvement

title: Phase 10.4 — Low-Risk Production Truth Reliability Campaign
summary:
Complete autonomous improvement loop executed across 4 LOW-risk candidates.

**Results:**
- PR #50 merged + production verified (pmv-2276623d)
- PRs #51, #52, #53 reviewed SAFE_TO_MERGE — awaiting operator merge
- 3 new scan sources added (9 total), documentation_alignment template created
- 40 tests written and passing, 8 cockpit endpoints verified
- All safety invariants held: no auto-merge, LOW-risk only, dry_run_only cadence

**Campaign metrics:**
- 8 candidates reviewed → 4 selected → 4 PRs created → 1 merged → 1 production verified
- Zero regressions introduced (1553 tests pass, 6 pre-existing failures)

**Pending operator actions:**
- Merge PR #51 (stale project name in github_trinity_ingest.py)
- Merge PR #52 (missing __init__.py in tests/substrate/)
- Merge PR #53 (stale worktree sys.path.insert in 8 test files)

**PR #54:** https://github.com/antonyfmunoz/OS/pull/54
